name: Dixon Dentistry
tagline: Two generations of gentle family dentistry in Sebastopol
seoDescription: Dixon Dentistry in Sebastopol, CA — family-owned dental care since 1975. Cleanings, crowns, implants, cosmetic & restorative dentistry. (707) 823-8529.

sections.heading: About Dixon Dentistry
body: Dixon Dentistry has been a fixture of western Sonoma County since 1975, when Dr. Gerald Dixon began caring for Sebastopol families. Decades later, his son, Dr. Scott Dixon, DDS, carries on that tradition at the same Palm Avenue office. Born and raised in Sebastopol, Dr. Scott attended local public schools, earned a degree in Biochemistry from UC Davis, worked as a research scientist in a dental lab at UC San Francisco, and went on to graduate from the UCSF Dental School before returning home to continue his family's practice.

With Dr. Gerald now retired and his patients in good hands, Dr. Scott and a familiar, longtime team uphold the same ideals: high-quality, gentle dentistry delivered with the personal attention of a true hometown practice. Many local families have trusted the Dixons for generations — some for more than forty years.
highlights: Family-owned and operated in Sebastopol since 1975
Founded by Dr. Gerald Dixon and continued by his son, Dr. Scott Dixon, DDS
Dr. Scott Dixon is a Sebastopol native and UCSF Dental School graduate
Comprehensive family care: cleanings, fillings, crowns, implants & cosmetic dentistry

sections.heading: Comprehensive care for the whole family

items.title: Exams & Cleanings
items.description: Routine check-ups, professional cleanings, digital x-rays, and oral cancer screenings to keep your smile healthy and catch issues early.

items.title: Restorative Dentistry
items.description: Tooth-colored composite fillings, crowns (caps), and fixed bridges to repair and rebuild damaged or missing teeth.

items.title: Dental Implants & Dentures
items.description: Single implants, fixed implant bridges, and removable implant dentures — including full-arch and 'teeth in a day' options — to restore your bite and confidence.

items.title: Root Canal Therapy
items.description: Gentle endodontic treatment to relieve pain, clear infection, and save a tooth that might otherwise be lost.

items.title: Cosmetic Dentistry
items.description: Teeth whitening, porcelain veneers, and Invisalign clear aligners to brighten and align your smile.

items.title: Children'S & Family Dentistry
items.description: Kid-friendly preventive care including fluoride treatments and sealants, plus at-home guidance for patients of every age.

items.title: Reach out
items.body: Call or message Dixon Dentistry and tell us what you need.

items.title: We assess
items.body: We look at the details and talk through the right approach with you.

items.title: We do the work
items.body: Our team handles it properly, keeping you in the loop along the way.

items.title: You’re set
items.body: The job’s done right, and we stand behind it.

items.quote: He was so gentle and took his time while still being efficient.
items.author: Patient review

items.quote: Scott's office and staff — Trina, Tracy and Monica are the folks I see most often — are terrific.
items.author: Longtime patient

sections.heading: Work with Dixon Dentistry
sections.body: Find us at 6800 Palm Ave. Call (707) 823-8529 — we’re glad to help.
